ref: They saw him and worshiped him, but some of them doubted.

translated: When the rain falls and destroys the farm, it is a loss. When the Koosa laborer works and the farm is successful, it is a gain for the Koosa family.

translated: They will come and meet us at the farm tomorrow morning. They will bring plenty of food. He will bring his siblings along.

translated: Jesus said to the Pharisees, "You clean the outside of the cup and dish, but inside they are full of greed and self-indulgence. Clean the inside first, and then the outside will also be clean."
